security.name: extension_in_public
security.title: Extension in Public
security.description: Detects extensions installed in the \`public\` schema.
security.detail: Extension \`pg_net\` is installed in the public schema. Move it to another schema.

security.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
security.title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
security.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable without signing in. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if it is not meant to be public.
security.detail: Function `public.ln_save_lotterynet_kv(p_key text, p_value text, p_upd timestamp with time zone)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/ln_save_lotterynet_kv`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.
security.cache_key: anon_security_definer_function_executable_public_ln_save_lotterynet_kv_p_key text, p_value text, p_upd timestamp with time zone

security.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
security.title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
security.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable without signing in. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if it is not meant to be public.
security.detail: Function `public.ln_save_lotterynet_results_by_day(p_result_date text, p_payload jsonb, p_updated_at timestamp with time zone)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/ln_save_lotterynet_results_by_day`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.
security.cache_key: anon_security_definer_function_executable_public_ln_save_lotterynet_results_by_day_p_result_date text, p_payload jsonb, p_updated_at timestamp with time zone

security.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
security.title: Signed-In Users Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
security.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable by signed-in users. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if signed-in users should not call it.
security.detail: Function `public.ln_save_lotterynet_kv(p_key text, p_value text, p_upd timestamp with time zone)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/ln_save_lotterynet_kv`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.
security.cache_key: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable_public_ln_save_lotterynet_kv_p_key text, p_value text, p_upd timestamp with time zone

security.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
security.title: Signed-In Users Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
security.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable by signed-in users. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if signed-in users should not call it.
security.detail: Function `public.ln_save_lotterynet_results_by_day(p_result_date text, p_payload jsonb, p_updated_at timestamp with time zone)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/ln_save_lotterynet_results_by_day`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

security.name: auth_leaked_password_protection
security.title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
security.description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
security.detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.

performance.name: auth_rls_initplan
performance.title: Auth RLS Initialization Plan
performance.description: Detects if calls to \`current_setting()\` and \`auth.<function>()\` in RLS policies are being unnecessarily re-evaluated for each row
performance.detail: Table \`public.auditoria\` has a row level security policy \`audit_select_scope\` that re-evaluates current_setting() or auth.<function>() for each row. This produces suboptimal query performance at scale. Resolve the issue by replacing \`auth.<function>()\` with \`(select auth.<function>())\`. See [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/database/postgres/row-level-security#call-functions-with-select) for more info.

performance.name: auth_rls_initplan
performance.title: Auth RLS Initialization Plan
performance.description: Detects if calls to \`current_setting()\` and \`auth.<function>()\` in RLS policies are being unnecessarily re-evaluated for each row
performance.detail: Table \`public.balances\` has a row level security policy \`balances_select_scope\` that re-evaluates current_setting() or auth.<function>() for each row. This produces suboptimal query performance at scale. Resolve the issue by replacing \`auth.<function>()\` with \`(select auth.<function>())\`. See [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/database/postgres/row-level-security#call-functions-with-select) for more info.
